Not the news I wanted to share, friends.

name: Ralph Northam
subject: Most politicians hate asking for money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek, I know what I said above seems odd, but it's true. -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, I know what I said above seems odd, but it's true.

As public servants what we enjoy doing most is helping people, representing our constituents, and being your voice. **But to get to that honor, Derek, we have to win an election.**

Winning my bid for Governor last year and helping to start a blue wave at the state level was the most rewarding victory. It sparked a nationwide conversation about the momentum that Democrats could have coming into _this_ midterm election. It took a strong operation, talking to all kinds of voters, _and, yes, asking for money._

**It 's not easy always asking for money, and I know it can feel like you're getting that a lot here in your inbox, but Derek, emailing you for help is such an important option for campaigns to have. Which is why I'm writing you today for my friend, Tim Kaine.**

[When grassroots donors like you step up, those are hours that Tim doesn't have to spend making phone calls or strategizing who he has to ask face to face.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11e4/3e0906/73d2a528/3e363761/3510052023/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180915_1_FR_RN_Northam-surrogate-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+When+grassroots+donors+like+you+step+up+&utm_campaign=20180915_1_FR_RN_Northam-surrogate-LDND&source=20180915_1_FR_RN_Northam-surrogate-LDND")

When we ask you for money, we put the option out for you all to help us meet these goals. And trust me, the expectation is NOT that you donate every time, because sometimes you can spare $5 _and sometimes you can 't - trust me, I get it._

But Tim and the team tell you where they're at with goals and when they could really use some help, so that you know when your support can make the biggest difference. **So, Derek, I 'm putting this on the table knowing that when you _can_ fill the gap, you do, and Tim can focus on talking to voters in Virginia.**

You all mean so much to Tim and me, you really do. The more you're able to pitch in, the more time Tim can spend at events talking with voters - and supporting Congressional candidates in every corner of Virginia. It takes money to run good campaigns, and that money is most powerful when it comes from people like you.

**I 'm just going to go ahead and ask: Tim has the biggest month of fundraising ahead of him, and he's going to need to come up with the money one way or another - whether its hours on the phone or sending emails. Can you help today, Derek?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11e4/3e0906/73d2a528/3e363765/3510052023/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180915_1_FR_RN_Northam-surrogate-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20180915_1_FR_RN_Northam-surrogate-LDND&source=20180915_1_FR_RN_Northam-surrogate-LDND")

You know what they say: Quality is not an act, it's a habit. Winning in 2017 with a quality program was a great feat - but now let's go make it a habit.

Take care,

_Ralph_

| | Insurance companies in charge of health care. Americans with pre-existing conditions, unable to find or afford insurance. Women seeking out back-alley abortions because the procedure is illegal. **These are the dark ages Republicans are trying to drag us back to.** Whether it's nominating Judge Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court or trying to repeal the Affordable Care Act, Republicans have proven they're unfit to lead. [**If you oppose Judge Kavanaugh and the GOP's radical agenda, help us fight them. Give $5 or more toward our $5,000 Mid Month goal. The deadline is only 24 hours from now.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ca4/622b7b5b/1cd68654/307b6d54/1977175352/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180914?refcode=dwse180914_b&recurring=true&amount=5") I'm a breast cancer survivor -- also known as an American with a pre-existing condition. I refuse to go back to a time when I, and the 130 million Americans like me, could be denied or charged extra for insurance. I'm a woman. I refuse to go back to a time when we couldn't access vital reproductive care or make our own medical decisions. No man in the White House, in Congress, or sitting on the Supreme Court will make medical decisions for me. I will fight to protect _Roe vs. Wade_ , family planning funds, and women's rights. I hope I can count on you to fight beside me. [**We're still $2,560 away from our goal. Don't wait around any longer -- give what you can.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ca4/622b7b5b/1cd68654/307b6d54/1977175352/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180914?refcode=dwse180914_b&recurring=true&amount=5") Thank you. Debbie

Hey --

[**_If we close our fundraising gap and hit $50,000 in grassroots donations by midnight tonight, Bob won't have to cut his advertising budget. name: Geoff Burgan, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: We're going to get there together
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Friends,

Growing up, Mayor Andrew Gillum's grandmother used to tell him to go to school and then bring his education home for his little brother, his baby sister, and the kids in his neighborhood. She knew that if folks were going to get anywhere in life, they were going to get there together.

Mayor Gillum took his grandmother's advice to heart -- and now that idea has become the centerpiece of our campaign. We even released our first TV ad of the general election based on that idea earlier this week.

And unlike our opponents, we are giving voters a reason to vote for something, not just against -- but we need your help to make sure every voter in Florida knows it.

**[Can we count on you to chip in $5, or whatever you can afford, now to help us keep our ad on the air and spread our story to every Floridian?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3718/9e00690/5a8949b4/24017d16/1269206619/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-grandmothers-voice-ad?gpsid=13_55_3582&refcode=em18_180915_NewAD_Kicker_fnd_gq_act_Gma_GB_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180915_NewAD_Kicker_fnd_gq_act_Gma_GB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&noskip=true&utm_content=1+-+Can+we+count+on+you+to+chip+in+5+or+what")**

Bring it home,

Geoff Burgan
Communications Director
Andrew Gillum for Governor

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3718/9e00690/5a8949b4/24017d29/1269206619/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-grandmothers-voice-ad?gpsid=13_55_3582&refcode=em18_180915_NewAD_Kicker_fnd_gq_act_Gma_GB_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180915_NewAD_Kicker_fnd_gq_act_Gma_GB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&noskip=true&utm_content=2+-+DONATE")

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Andrew Gillum
Date: Thu, Sep 13, 2018
Subject: I can still hear my grandmother's voice:

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3718/9e00690/5a8949b4/24017d28/1269206619/VEsF/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=em18_180915_NewAD_Kicker_fnd_gq_act_Gma_GB_ettx&source=em18_180915_NewAD_Kicker_fnd_gq_act_Gma_GB_ettx")

Friends,

Growing up, my grandmother always told me to go to school, mind my teachers, get my lessons, and bring that education home -- for my little brother, my baby sister, and the kids in my neighborhood.

My grandmother knew then what I know now: if we want to get anywhere in life, we need to get there together. I truly believe that this can be our story again, Florida -- that's why I decided to run for Governor -- but I need your help to make it happen.

**[Our campaign just released a new TV ad letting everyone know what's possible if we show up for each other this November. Watch it now and then chip in $5, or whatever you can afford, to help us spread our story to every corner of the state.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3718/9e00690/5a8949b4/24017d2b/1269206619/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-grandmothers-voice-ad?gpsid=13_55_3582&refcode=em18_180915_NewAD_Kicker_fnd_gq_act_Gma_GB_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180915_NewAD_Kicker_fnd_gq_act_Gma_GB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&noskip=true&utm_content=4+-+Our+campaign+just+released+a+new+TV+ad+l")**

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3718/9e00690/5a8949b4/24017d2a/1269206619/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-grandmothers-voice-ad?gpsid=13_55_3582&refcode=em18_180915_NewAD_Kicker_fnd_gq_act_Gma_GB_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180915_NewAD_Kicker_fnd_gq_act_Gma_GB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&noskip=true&utm_content=5")
[WATCH THE VIDEO](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3718/9e00690/5a8949b4/24017d2d/1269206619/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-grandmothers-voice-ad?gpsid=13_55_3582&refcode=em18_180915_NewAD_Kicker_fnd_gq_act_Gma_GB_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180915_NewAD_Kicker_fnd_gq_act_Gma_GB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&noskip=true&utm_content=6+-+WATCH+THE+VIDEO")
For anyone who's ever been told they don't belong.

For anyone who's ever been told they couldn't accomplish something because of where they came from.

For anyone who's ever been told they couldn't make a difference.

I stand with you and so do thousands of Floridians who have joined this campaign.

Together, we can bring it home for affordable healthcare, we can bring it home for better jobs and better wages, and we can bring it home for the public education our children deserve.

**[Chip in $5, or whatever you can afford, to help spread our story so we can bring it home on Tuesday, November 6 and win this election together.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3718/9e00690/5a8949b4/24017d2c/1269206619/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-grandmothers-voice-ad?gpsid=13_55_3582&refcode=em18_180915_NewAD_Kicker_fnd_gq_act_Gma_GB_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180915_NewAD_Kicker_fnd_gq_act_Gma_GB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&noskip=true&utm_content=7+-+Chip+in+5+or+whatever+you+can+afford+to+")**

Bring it home,

Andrew Gillum

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3718/9e00690/5a8949b4/24017d2f/1269206619/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-grandmothers-voice-ad?gpsid=13_55_3582&refcode=em18_180915_NewAD_Kicker_fnd_gq_act_Gma_GB_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180915_NewAD_Kicker_fnd_gq_act_Gma_GB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=8+-+DONATE")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

name: Sen. Joe Donnelly
subject: My friend Mel Hall
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friends, I'll cut to the chase: **[I'm asking you to make a donation to help Mel Hall win his race to represent Indiana's 2nd District in the U.S. House.](https://act.myngp.com/el/E11PmCAhIYWG8L3H8tYIGuFPkthxT-wbIFp_k497UK0=/H4O9Kboy62HtQgIaGaehdCrdBJllUnElgQP-Mkq9RbU=?refcode=em180915_donnelly)** This is the district that I represented for six years, and if you give me a minute to explain, I'll tell you why you should support Mel with a contribution today.

**First and foremost, Mel is a hard worker.** The Hoosiers I fight for every day in the Senate go to work in the dark, and they come home in the dark, too. We could use more folks in Congress who know what that's like. Mel grew up working on his family's farm and led a small business, so he knows a thing or two about working hard and getting results.

**Second, Mel 's experience makes him perfect for the job.** He grew up in Grant County, served as a Methodist minister in one of Detroit's poorest neighborhoods, and turned a small business with 33 employees into an operation of _more than 800 well-paid workers_.

**Third, he 'll fight for affordable and accessible health care.** Just last month, I had the opportunity to participate in a health care round table with Mel where we met with Hoosiers with pre-existing conditions. I know Mel will fight with everything he's got for the tens of thousands of Hoosiers with pre-existing conditions in the 2nd District.

This race is going to be very competitive. After Mel won the Democratic nomination for Congress in the second district, _Roll Call_ upgraded the race rating and reported that the seat he's running for was now more likely to flip!

**But it won 't happen on its own -- it takes a hardworking candidate with a LOT of grassroots support to win elections. I know Mel's working hard -- so will you chip in to give him the grassroots support he needs to win in the 2nd District?**

Thanks,

Joe

name: Tracy Newman
subject: It's time to act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
We need to act on climate change, right now.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bc4c/2f5ea88d/75b64902/2cbc46ac/2959514500/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-climate-midmonth?utm_source=ema_2018-09-15_mid-month-3&refcode=ema_2018-09-15_mid-month-3&utm_campaign=mid-month-3&utm_medium=ema") Dear Friend, I was just with Governor Inslee at the Global Climate Action Summit, and I can tell you firsthand: We all agree, it's time to act on climate change, right now. This is the legacy we are leaving behind for our children's children -- we can't have them look back at our time and wonder why no one acted to prevent the horrendous effects of climate change while we still could. [**That's why we need climate leaders like Jay Inslee to act when the other Washington won't. So I'm asking you now: Will you chip in to power our climate movement and help Jay fight back against climate change? Our big mid-month deadline strikes at midnight tonight.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bc4c/2f5ea88d/75b64902/2cbc46ac/2959514500/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-climate-midmonth?utm_source=ema_2018-09-15_mid-month-3&refcode=ema_2018-09-15_mid-month-3&utm_campaign=mid-month-3&utm_medium=ema") Thanks -- with your help, I know we can do this. Sincerely, Tracy Newman | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bc4c/2f5ea88d/75b64902/2cbc46ac/2959514500/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-climate-midmonth?utm_source=ema_2018-09-15_mid-month-3&refcode=ema_2018-09-15_mid-month-3&utm_campaign=mid-month-3&utm_medium=ema")

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Jay Inslee
Date: Thursday, Sept 13, 2018
Subject: Weakening
Friend,
**First** , it was the lowering of auto emissions standards to pump more carbon dioxide into our atmosphere.
**Then** , Trump repealed the Clean Power Plan, proposing a replacement that would let coal power plants spew unchecked amounts of air pollutants from the nation's smokestacks. By their own estimates, 1,400 more people would die prematurely each year from such high levels of pollution.
**But now?** Trump and his climate-change-denying administration are making it easier for oil companies to release methane into our air. **This is a huge step backwards in our fight against climate change.**
[**They're taking down our environmental protections, one by one. And that's why I need you to help me build our climate movement now. Can you contribute before our big mid-month deadline on September 15?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bc4c/2f5ea88d/75b64902/2cbc46ac/2959514500/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-climate-midmonth?utm_source=ema_2018-09-15_mid-month-3&refcode=ema_2018-09-15_mid-month-3&utm_campaign=mid-month-3&utm_medium=ema")
The Trump administration's new proposals would allow far more methane to leak from oil and gas drilling operations. Methane is a huge climate change accelerator -- even though it is not as prevalent as carbon dioxide, it is far more effective (twenty-five time more effective!) at trapping heat in the atmosphere than carbon dioxide. A huge amount of methane pollution comes straight from oil and gas operations.
Big oil and gas companies hate monitoring their equipment for methane leaks -- it takes time and money to regulate. But such regulations are absolutely necessary for making sure their equipment isn't emitting countless tons of methane into our atmosphere -- permanently.
I disagree strongly with the Trump administration's efforts to deregulate big oil and gas. These decisions are clearly motivated by deep-pocketed lobbyists, not by any concern for the future of our children and grandchildren. And that's why I'm stepping up to fight back -- but I need your help.
[**Before our September 15 deadline, will you contribute to powering up our climate movement? We must work together to fight back against Donald Trump and his administration's deadly rollbacks of our environmental regulations.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bc4c/2f5ea88d/75b64902/2cbc46ac/2959514500/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-climate-midmonth?utm_source=ema_2018-09-15_mid-month-3&refcode=ema_2018-09-15_mid-month-3&utm_campaign=mid-month-3&utm_medium=ema")
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee

"To have sat on a report, to have been the only person in this congressional delegation to have known that a doctor was over-prescribing opioids, a veteran died and many others became addicted, to me, it's unconscionable."
## [Fox 6 Milwaukee: GOP Senate candidate Vukmir meets with veterans](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=65cde682204f4c00a95d3af79d8e19a2&_e=i43oqpKg9C4O4gm6xNTmBpPWrhBtsASzlqUb7Xa27AgJ_QyCZBak7XB_dj4aVd9qtN19wjMTxVYW3idJBCG7J-vzq1YuRbdFpnhMMR_peeJEXhHeIuEKdvSFT4C5V-8spLxgarY1QHMfNEJeVyjxHm6rN7EOQbo42u5cYgGf0tBsAisrBpmltj6SNlVn3SjLTFoQX1czXJMlUibyHhzX5CMP1lc42kJsKQR8AAgsAHLPjlbAAwM765rx01s-Zgz0b2GxSLd68ObBK_a4yHBHwBRsI571aCYO4UFq5-H_oHfmPT5tuhs2nzIZbY0sXMVhxzBsHs_HKDA1jCDWFCK5NetGYg_v3_bBOGCseIVA0nMmJYUCnKn5cew14y8J1DzXOsGyoPnjwAWUVzGgDCC35Q%3D%3D)
During a roundtable with Vukmir on Monday, Sept. 10, several Wisconsin veterans shared war stories and horror stories about trying to get medical care at VA hospitals. Meanwhile, Baldwin's campaign launched a TV ad criticizing Vukmir for voting against legislation requiring insurance companies to cover a cancer treatment.

At Vukmir's event, the veterans said they were looking to the candidate -- whose son is a U.S. Army ranger -- to push changes that would allow them to more easily get private medical care.

"I'm thrilled we have the opportunity to send someone to go fight these fights, who has actual skin in the game," said Sam Rogers, an Army veteran who served in Afghanistan and is now a University of Wisconsin-Milwaukee student.

"You have my commitment. Don't worry about that," Vukmir told them.

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Toxic water isn't worth it
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3719/9e00690/5a995408/24017dd2/587778960/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180911_enviro_engg_gq_act__AG_ettx&source=em18_180911_enviro_engg_gq_act__AG_ettx")
Friends --

Between our coastlines, the Everglades, and diverse wildlife, our state is home to some of the most majestic places on Earth. I feel lucky to be from the great state of Florida every day -- but I'm worried my children, and their children, won't feel the same.

Under Rick Scott, environmental protections have been pushed aside in favor of corporate gain. Red tide and toxic algae are historically out of control. And Scott's Florida Department of Environmental Protection, _an agency whose job is to protect our environment_ , isn't doing anything about it.

Our air quality, water quality, sea-life, and ecosystem belong to all of us -- not to any individual, not to any corporation, and not to any Governor. The Governor's job, first and foremost, is to do what is in the interest of all Floridians, not just the wealthy and well-connected.

**[If we continue ignoring science in favor of corporate gain, future generations will be the ones to suffer the consequences. Add your name to demand our environment is prioritized.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3719/9e00690/5a995408/24017dd5/587778960/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/add-your-name-protect-our-environment?gpsid=13_55_3535&source=em18_180911_enviro_engg_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180911_enviro_engg_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&firstname=&lastname=&zip=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=2+-+If+we+continue+ignoring+science+in+favor")**

Listen, no corporate profit is worth destroying our clean air and water.

If we want our children and grandchildren to experience the wonders our state has to offer, we must start making real strides to protect our environment. It's time Floridians have a leader with a proven record of standing up to attacks on our environment -- one who will ensure that future generations can enjoy our planet's resources.

As Governor, I'll put the "environmental protection" back in the Florida Department of Environmental Protection. But we can't just wait until November to start demanding better -- we need to take action now.

**[Add your name next to mine to protect our environment for now and future generations to come.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3719/9e00690/5a995408/24017dd4/587778960/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/add-your-name-protect-our-environment?gpsid=13_55_3535&source=em18_180911_enviro_engg_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180911_enviro_engg_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&firstname=&lastname=&zip=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+next+to+mine+to+protect+ou")**
Bring it home,
Andrew Gillum

Derek, Virginia Governor Ralph Northam wanted to send a message to our supporters and do something he doesn't even like to do: Ask for money. -------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | [Derek, Virginia Governor Ralph Northam wanted to send a message to our supporters and do something he doesn't even like to do: Ask for money.

But asking for help is how we got Gov. Northam elected, nearly flipped the state legislature _and_ put Virginia in a position to expand Medicaid.

**We have so much left to accomplish - will you help? Tomorrow this campaign is entering our first fundraising deadline of the month, and we need to keep up every step of the way if we want to reach our goal for the quarter:**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11e1/3e0906/732254c5/3e360b6d/1003789171/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180915_2_FR_TEAM_Northam-fwd-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+FIRSTNAMEFolks+Virginia+Governor+Ralph+N&utm_campaign=20180915_2_FR_TEAM_Northam-fwd-LDND&source=20180915_2_FR_TEAM_Northam-fwd-LDND")

FROM: Ralph Northam
SUBJECT: Most politicians hate asking for money

Derek, I know what I said above seems odd, but it's true.

As public servants what we enjoy doing most is helping people, representing our constituents, and being your voice. **But to get to that honor, Derek, we have to win an election.**

Winning my bid for Governor last year and helping to start a blue wave at the state level was the most rewarding victory. It sparked a nationwide conversation about the momentum that Democrats could have coming into _this_ midterm election. It took a strong operation, talking to all kinds of voters, _and, yes, asking for money._

**It 's not easy always asking for money, and I know it can feel like you're getting that a lot here in your inbox, but Derek, emailing you for help is such an important option for campaigns to have. Which is why I'm writing you today for my friend, Tim Kaine.**

[When grassroots donors like you step up, those are hours that Tim doesn't have to spend making phone calls or strategizing who he has to ask face to face.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11e1/3e0906/732254c5/3e360b62/1003789171/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180915_2_FR_TEAM_Northam-fwd-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+When+grassroots+donors+like+you+step+up+&utm_campaign=20180915_2_FR_TEAM_Northam-fwd-LDND&source=20180915_2_FR_TEAM_Northam-fwd-LDND")

When we ask you for money, we put the option out for you all to help us meet these goals. And trust me, the expectation is NOT that you donate every time, because sometimes you can spare $5 _and sometimes you can 't - trust me, I get it._

But Tim and the team tell you where they're at with goals and when they could really use some help, so that you know when your support can make the biggest difference. **So, Derek, I 'm putting this on the table knowing that when you _can_ fill the gap, you do, and Tim can focus on talking to voters in Virginia.**

You all mean so much to Tim and me, you really do. The more you're able to pitch in, the more time Tim can spend at events talking with voters - and supporting Congressional candidates in every corner of Virginia. It takes money to run good campaigns, and that money is most powerful when it comes from people like you.

**I 'm just going to go ahead and ask: Tim has the biggest month of fundraising ahead of him, and he's going to need to come up with the money one way or another - whether its hours on the phone or sending emails. Can you help today, Derek?**
